'''Distna''' was the hollow [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Corvis Minor V]].

==History==
It had half-standard gravity and only a bit of atmosphere. [[Ysanne Isard (clone)|Ysanne Isard's clone]] tricked [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] into thinking the [[Pulsar Station]] was being built inside the moon. It was named after the [[Distna (individual)|wife]] of the [[Star system/Legends|system's]] discoverer. It was the site of a [[Battle of Distna|skirmish]] between the [[Ciutric Hegemony]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

{{Moon-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''
